description: Dual-track forecast accuracy log. opening_bias = gap direction scored at morning open. session_direction = close direction scored at EOD. Both tracks are independent.

summary.note: Updated April 15 morning brief. 6 sessions total (5 scored + 1 pending Apr 15). Direction: 3/5 correct in scored sessions (60%). Opening bias track: 2 forecasted, 0 fully correct (both PARTIAL). Brent $97.50 on April 14 — Iran outreach signal substantially changed regime assumptions.

opening_bias.description: Gap direction at 9:15 AM open. Generated by EOD wrap, scored by morning brief.
opening_bias.note: Track: 2 sessions forecasted (April 13, April 15). Both scored PARTIAL. April 13: GAP_DOWN -1.25% forecast, actual -1.92% → direction correct, magnitude underestimated. April 15: GAP_DOWN -0.8% forecast, actual ~-0.25% → direction correct, magnitude overestimated (Brent fell $4.76 on Iran outreach). Fully CORRECT count: 0. Partial correct: 2. Accuracy improving — regime shifts are reducing gap vs actual.

session_direction.description: Where Nifty closes vs prior close. Generated by morning brief, scored by EOD wrap.
session_direction.note: 5 legacy sessions (Apr 7-10, Apr 13) + Apr 15 pending. 2/4 correct in scored sessions. Apr 13: PARTIAL (direction DOWN correct, magnitude underestimated). Apr 15: PENDING.

forecast.key_assumption: De-escalation narrative holds, FII selling moderates

actual.session_theme: IT sector decoupling — HCLTECH +2.73%, INFY +2.54%, TCS +2.66% led a surprise recovery

accuracy.direction_note: Forecast SIDEWAYS_UP, actual UP +0.68% — direction correct but magnitude underestimated
accuracy.magnitude_note: Nifty closed at 23,123 — ABOVE the 22,600-23,000 forecast range but in the same ballpark
accuracy.brent_note: Brent rose to $110.15, above the $105-110 forecast range

lessons: IT sector can decouple from geopolitical risk when USD strengthens + global tech rotates — add as factor M011_IT_USD_DECOUPLING
De-escalation narrative doesn't need to be confirmed for market to rally — markets anticipate before news
Should have weighted higher probability on 'wait and see' outcome (Session A actual = market waited for Apr 7 deadline, not Apr 6 deadline)
sessions.proposed_improvement: Add IT/USD correlation check to forecast: if USD strengthening AND global tech in rally, add +0.3-0.5% bullish buffer to Nifty forecast regardless of geopolitical regime

forecast.key_assumption: Trump Tuesday deadline expiry — extension most likely (40%) vs strikes (40%) vs deal (20%)

actual.fii_net: ~+₹4,500 Cr estimated (provisional — April 7 actual: FII -₹8,692 Cr, DII +₹7,979 Cr)
actual.top_gainers: Shriram Finance +9.95%, Adani Enterprises +8.60%, Tata Motors +8.44%, IndiGo +8.11%, Eicher Motors +7.96%, L&T +7.60%, Bajaj Finance +7.02%
actual.top_sectors: Aviation, Auto, Paints — direct oil price beneficiaries
actual.special_events: RBI kept policy repo rate unchanged (additional positive catalyst). TCS Q4FY26 results announced April 9.
actual.session_theme: CEASEFIRE EUPHORIA + RBI RELIEF — Trump 2-week suspension confirmed at 5:30 AM IST, Iran accepted, Hormuz safe passage protocol. Nifty best single-day rally in 11 months (+873.70 pts). Brent crashed -17.55% to $93.13. RBI rate hold added further confidence. Top sectors: Aviation (+8-10%), Auto (+7-9%), Paints. IndiGo hit upper circuit limit at ₹4,614.90.

accuracy.direction_note: Forecast DOWN -0.8%, actual UP +3.78% — direction WRONG. Underestimated probability of DEAL scenario (assigned 20%, actual = 100%).
accuracy.magnitude_note: Forecast range 22,600-23,000 (DOWN). Actual 23,997.35 — 997 pts ABOVE forecast range. Magnitude error = -4.58% (actual +3.78% vs forecast -0.8%).
accuracy.brent_note: Forecast $108-115. Actual $93.13. Crude crashed 17.55% below forecast due to ceasefire + Hormuz reopening + demand destruction fears easing.

lessons: Geopolitical binary forecasts underweighted 'best case' outcomes. When Trump sets a deadline with 3 possible outcomes, markets price in probability-weighted view. This forecast weighted (40% extension, 40% strikes, 20% deal) but market knew deal was Trump's preference = should have weighted deal higher.
Ceasefire announcement = regime shift from ESCALATION to DE-ESCALATION is BINARY. NOT incremental. April 8 proved this — a single diplomatic breakthrough overrode 3 days of fear premium.
Commodities are leading — when crude crashes 17% in one session, equity indices rally on cost relief. Should monitor crude for early regime signals.
RBI rate decisions can amplify geopolitical relief rallies — always check RBI/central bank calendar when forecasting on binary event days.
sessions.error_root_cause: FORECAST_PAT003_GEOPOLITICAL_BINARY_UNDERWEIGHTING — when a deadline has 3+ possible outcomes with asymmetric payoffs, markets reveal a revealed preference for the best outcome sooner than consensus expects. April 8 ceasefire proved this.
sessions.proposed_improvement: For binary geopolitical forecasts with 3+ outcomes: Run scenario-weighted forecast (40% A outcome, 30% B outcome, 20% C outcome) but ALSO mark the 'best case' outcome as a reversal trigger. April 8: best case WAS deal; when deal materialized, all bearish assumptions collapsed. Next time, flag 'if deal → regime flips to +2-4% Nifty rally'. Also check RBI calendar for same-day policy decisions.

forecast.key_assumption: Post-ceasefire profit-booking. TCS Q4 results (April 9). April 10 Islamabad talks. FII flows uncertain.

actual.session_theme: POST-CEASEFIRE PULLBACK. Trump stated US-Iran situation 'remains tense until a real pact is reached' — dampening optimism. Bloomberg: 'India Rally Shows Signs of Short Covering, Lacks Fresh Buying'. TCS Q4FY26 announced post-market (strong beat — revenue ₹70,698 cr, TCV $12B record, dividend ₹31/share) but Nifty had already closed by then.

accuracy.direction_note: Forecast FLAT_TO_SLIGHTLY_UP, actual DOWN -0.93%. Direction WRONG.
accuracy.magnitude_note: Forecast range 23,800-24,100. Actual close 23,775.10 — 25 pts BELOW lower bound. Near-miss but outside range.
accuracy.brent_note: Brent estimated stable ~$93-95. Within forecast $90-97 range. CORRECT.

lessons: Post-ceasefire sessions are not automatic 'hold gains' sessions — headline risk from the same actor (Trump) can re-introduce doubt same-day
Bloomberg 'short covering, lacks fresh buying' signal — when a 3.78% rally is driven by short covering rather than fresh institutional longs, the next session is vulnerable to reversal
Positive post-market results (TCS) can't prevent intraday selling when the regime signal is mixed — the market prices the live headline, not the after-hours good news
April 9 miss was a very near-miss (25 pts below range) — model calibration is acceptable, but the direction call needs to incorporate 'Trump headline risk' on Iran even during ceasefire days
sessions.error_root_cause: TRUMP_CEASEFIRE_AMBIGUITY — Trump's comment 'remains tense until real pact' on ceasefire Day 2 introduced doubt about the durability of the April 8 rally. Combined with Bloomberg's short-covering warning, market gave back gains without fresh catalysts. TCS results positive but post-market. Magnitude error: -0.73% vs forecast (25 pts below lower bound — very near miss).

forecast.base_case_scenario: Talks Neutral (45%) — ceasefire holds, no breakthrough
forecast.key_assumption: Islamabad talks 10AM IST — VP Vance vs FM Araghchi. Nuclear enrichment red line vs Hormuz oversight demand. Talks likely neutral/ongoing. TCS gap-up provides IT floor.

actual.session_theme: TALKS_NEUTRAL — Islamabad talks concluded without breakthrough or collapse. Ceasefire holds through April 22. TCS sell-on-news confirmed (₹2,539.80). Brent intraday low $92 on Trump delay announcement before recovering to $95.95. Nifty closed inside P016 range.

accuracy.direction_note: Forecast BINARY_VOLATILE — base TALKS_NEUTRAL. Actual: talks neutral, Nifty +1.16%. Direction correct (market moved up on neutral talks outcome vs TALKS_FAIL fear).
accuracy.magnitude_note: Nifty closed at ~24,050 — inside P016 range 23,900–24,100 ✓. Forecast range partially vindicated.
accuracy.brent_note: Brent at $95.95 — slightly above the $90-97 de-escalation zone forecast. Intraday touched $92 on Trump delay news. Close call.

lessons: TALKS_NEUTRAL outcome is mildly bullish — markets price in 'disaster averted' even without progress. April 10 proved this: no breakthrough, yet Nifty +1.16%.
TCS sell-on-news confirmed: stock dropped despite Q4 beat. IT earnings catalyst timing matters as much as the beat itself.
Brent intraday volatility on geopolitical headlines can be large (-4% intraday) but mean-reverts within the session. End-of-day price is more signal than intraday swings.

key_drivers: US announces naval blockade of Strait of Hormuz (starts April 13 10 AM ET)
US stock futures: S&P -1%, Nasdaq -1.3%, Dow -500pts
Islamabad talks failed — talks_failed regime fully confirmed
Iran IRGC on highest alert — last warning not retracted

session_direction.key_assumption: US Hormuz blockade starts today + Brent >$100 = sustained war premium, no intraday relief rally without ceasefire news

session_direction_accuracy.direction_note: Forecast DOWN, actual DOWN. Direction CORRECT but magnitude underestimated. Forecast -2.5%, actual -0.91% — market held better than expected.
session_direction_accuracy.range_note: Nifty closed at 23,830 — INSIDE range 23300-23650. Within forecast envelope.
session_direction_accuracy.brent_note: Forecast: Brent >$100. Actual $102.26. Within expectation but spike faster than base model ($101-103 range expected, actual $102). Close call.

actual.session_theme: US-IRAN TALKS FAIL + HORMUZ BLOCKADE — Ceasefire collapse over weekend (April 11) triggered war premium resumption. US naval blockade of Iranian ports announced April 13 10 AM ET. Brent spiked to $102.26 (+6.58%). Nifty opened -1.92% gap down at 23,589, recovered intraday to 23,830 (-0.91% from prev close). FII selling continues. Oil & Gas sector down 3%. Aviation/Airlines weak. Defensive sectors (Gold, Pharma) tracking positively but broad selloff prevented rally. War premium fully priced in at Brent $102+.

lessons: Geopolitical talk failures are more impactful on intraday than sustained trend reversals. April 13 proved: Nifty gapped down hard (-1.92%) but recovered +240 pts intraday. This is classic 'fear spike + fade' when the underlying regime (blockade escalation) is already fully priced.

Defense stocks as war premium indicator: ASTRA_MICRO at 1,132 (P012 target exceeded). When war premium is sustainable (not temporary talks failure), defense names hold and extend. April 13 confirmed P012 RIGHT — defense premium durable through blockade escalation.

Opening bias models need refinement for Talk-Failure days. GIFT Nifty -1.25% gap forecast was good, but actual -1.92% gap shows markets price Iran IRGC threats more severely at Asia open than US models predict. Incorporate IRGC_THREAT_SEVERITY_INDEX for future geopolitical talk failures.

opening_bias_accuracy.direction_note: Forecast GAP_DOWN -1.25%, actual GAP_DOWN -1.92%. Direction correct but magnitude underestimated by 0.67%.

key_drivers: US naval blockade of Iranian ports ACTIVE (Day 3)
April 14 = market holiday (Ambedkar Jayanti) — no domestic session to buffer
S&P 500 futures flat overnight (April 13 US session +1% — 'Iran war losses wiped out')
Iran IRGC 'last warning' still active — no formal ceasefire
opening_bias.note: Generated by EOD wrap April 13. Based on Brent $102.26 and blockade escalation sustained.

opening_bias_actual.scoring_note: Forecast GAP_DOWN -0.8% (Gift Nifty 23,641). Actual gap ~-0.25% (Gift Nifty ~23,820). Direction CORRECT but magnitude significantly overestimated. Key reason for overestimate: On April 14 (Indian holiday), Brent fell from $102.26 to ~$97.50 as Trump said Iran 'reached out and wants to deal' — reducing war premium substantially. Brent decline of ~$4.76 provided ~+58 pts positive buffer to Nifty, and Iran outreach signal added ~+40 pts diplomatic premium. Actual open much better than forecast.
opening_bias_actual.source_note: Estimated: Brent ~$97.50 on April 14 per Investing.com/Reuters. GIFT Nifty pre-open not accessible via live feeds. NSE open estimated from Brent-Nifty sensitivity model.

session_direction.key_assumption: Brent eased to $97.50 on Iran outreach signal (Trump says Iran called, wants deal). No formal ceasefire yet — blockade still in effect. April 22 deadline 7 days away. Brent decline reduces inflation drag on financials/autos. Iran outreach creates diplomatic optionality but not resolution.

base_case.description: Iran outreach sustains — no deal yet, Brent holds $95-100. Range consolidation.

relief_rally.description: Iran-US dialogue progresses: formal talks announced, Brent falls below $95

escalation.description: Iran rejects outreach / IRGC incident in Hormuz — blockade hardens

session_direction.brent_forecast: $95-100 (declining from $102.26 — Iran outreach reducing war premium)
key_risks: Iran IRGC 'last warning' — any Hormuz incident overrides outreach signal
Trump April 22 deadline — markets may still price uncertainty
FII flows — sustained selling can cap any rally even on positive Iran news
key_opportunities: MRPL / Refiners: Brent at $97.50 vs $102.26 = GRM recovery thesis back on track
IndiGo / Airlines: ATF cost relief returns if Brent holds below $100
Banking/Financials: Bounce potential as rate concern eases with lower crude
SETFGOLD: Monitor — war premium easing slightly, but still above $95 = hold

session_direction_accuracy.direction_note: Pending — to be scored by EOD wrap April 15

patterns_observed.name: IT_USD_DECOUPLING
patterns_observed.description: When USD strengthens AND global tech stocks rally, Nifty tends to outperform bearish geopolitical forecasts by 0.5-1.0% due to IT sector weightage (~15% of Nifty)

patterns_observed.name: DEADLINE_EXTENSION_RELIEF
patterns_observed.description: When a geopolitical deadline is extended (not resolved), markets see brief relief rally on 'disaster averted for now' sentiment — even if underlying risk persists

patterns_observed.name: GEOPOLITICAL_BINARY_UNDERWEIGHTING
patterns_observed.description: When a binary geopolitical event has 3+ possible outcomes (strikes/extension/deal), markets price the 'best case' scenario sooner and with more probability than consensus forecasts assign. Binary resolution creates regime flips, not incremental moves.
patterns_observed.evidence: April 7 (IT decoupling anticipation before deadline) + April 8 (deal materialised at 100% probability vs 20% forecast weight). Both cases show markets price best-case outcomes faster than consensus.

framework_improvements_implemented.improvement: Added IT/USD correlation check to morning forecast generation. When USD strengthening AND global tech in rally mode, add +0.3-0.5% bullish buffer to Nifty forecast.
framework_improvements_implemented.triggered_by: Apr 7 session PARTIAL_CORRECT — missed IT sector decoupling

framework_improvements_implemented.improvement: For future binary geopolitical forecasts: Include REVERSAL TRIGGER conditions. When best-case outcome materializes (deal/ceasefire), regime flips to +2-4% Nifty rally, not +0.5% extension relief.
framework_improvements_implemented.triggered_by: Apr 8 session WRONG forecast — underweighted deal scenario impact on markets

framework_improvements_implemented.improvement: FORECAST_PAT003 (Geopolitical Binary Underweighting) PROMOTED to framework. Always apply +2-4% reversal trigger when best-case scenario in a 3-outcome binary materializes.
framework_improvements_implemented.triggered_by: 2 confirmed occurrences: April 7 (IT anticipation) + April 8 (ceasefire deal)

framework_improvements_implemented.improvement: Add RBI/central bank calendar check to forecast generation. RBI rate decisions on the same day as binary geopolitical events can amplify moves significantly.
framework_improvements_implemented.triggered_by: Apr 8 RBI rate unchanged decision amplified ceasefire rally
